privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated data. The expected output is saved to 'data/clean_signups.csv' within the project directory '/home/ga/PycharmProjects/gdpr_cleaner'. To pass data retention validation, the final dataset must contain at least 480 rows. Contrary to the task description claiming 15 tests, there are exactly 9 tests in the provided test suite.
